data.title: US launches probe into Brazil’s Pix system as it grows; Trump imposes 50% tariff and orders trade investigation amidst BRICS discussions.
data.description: Following the expansion of Brazil's Pix system and discussions within BRICS regarding the creation of a reserve currency, the United States President, Trump, has announced a significant response. This response includes imposing a 50% tariff and initiating a comprehensive trade investigation. The developments have added tension to the global economic landscape.

data.title: Rivalry Corp's management cease trade order revoked by Ontario Securities Commission as it filed annual and interim financial statements.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, Rivalry Corp. (TSXV: RVLY), a globally operating sports betting and media organization, proudly announced the Ontario Securities Commission's decision to lift the management cease trade order (MCTO) that was imposed on May 2, 2025. This action was taken in accordance with National Policy 12-203, as Rivalry successfully submitted its annual audited financial statements, management's discussion and analysis, and related certifications for the year ended December 31, 2024, along with unaudited interim financial statements for the three months ended March 31, 2025. This development signals a positive step for Rivalry, indicating its compliance with regulatory requirements.

data.title: E-bike manufacturer's stock surges 135% after revealing $500M Bitcoin investment plan, following trend of corporate treasuries.
data.description: Volcon, a manufacturer of electric vehicles, recently revealed plans to invest around $470 million in Bitcoin. This move aligns with the growing trend of companies diversifying their treasuries with cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: Human Longevity, Inc. pledges $1 million to prevent late-stage ovarian cancer using Avantect® Liquid Biopsy technology.
data.description: A recent announcement reflects a strong belief in early detection, with backing from the Avantect® Liquid Biopsy and HLI's Executive Health Program. Headquartered in South San Francisco, Human Longevity, Inc. (HLI), an influential player in precision medicine and proactive healthcare, made the declaration on July 17, 2025. This move showcases a renewed dedication to early detection methods that are crucial in identifying health issues at their nascent stages. HLI's commitment reinforces the significance of leveraging advanced technologies, with numbers indicating a substantial investment in furthering research and development efforts to revolutionize healthcare practices.

data.title: PRA applauds S. 2335, Patients Deserve Price Tags Act by Senator Marshall, to enforce hospital price transparency rules.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, PatientRightsAdvocate.org (PRA) expressed support for the introduction of S. 2335, also known as the Patients Deserve Price Tags Act, in Washington. The proposed legislation, brought forth by Senator Roger Marshall (R-KS), aims to establish federal regulations regarding price transparency for hospitals and insurers. PRA commended this initiative to enhance transparency in healthcare costs for consumers.

FED’S WALLER: A RATE CUT IN JULY COULD GIVE THE FED ROOM TO HOLD STEADY FOR SEVERAL MEETINGS. HE NOTED THAT WITHOUT THE TARIFF EFFECTS, INFLATION IS ALREADY NEARING THE FED’S 2% TARGET, THOUGH TARIFFS WILL PUSH INFLATION HIGHER IN THE SHORT TERM.

FED’S WALLER: RISKS NOW INCLUDE AN ECONOMIC SLOWDOWN, WITH GDP HOVERING NEAR 1%, SUGGESTING THE NEED FOR POLICY CLOSER TO A NEUTRAL STANCE. HE EXPECTS THE INFLATIONARY IMPACT OF TARIFFS TO FADE BY NEXT YEAR.

FED’S WALLER: DELAYING RATE CUTS COULD FORCE THE FED INTO MORE AGGRESSIVE ACTION LATER. HE NOTED GROWING EVIDENCE OF A WEAKENING LABOR MARKET AND SAID UPCOMING TARIFFS WILL LIKELY HAVE A ONE-TIME INFLATIONARY IMPACT THAT THE FED CAN LOOK PAST.

FED’S WALLER: DATA INDICATES THE JOB MARKET IS "ON THE EDGE," WITH PRIVATE SECTOR HIRING NEARLY STALLING. HE SEES LIMITED UPSIDE RISKS TO INFLATION, ESTIMATING A SUSTAINED 10% TARIFF COULD RAISE INFLATION BY 0.75% TO 1% THIS YEAR.

data.title: RBLP Leadership Certifications seeking new Training Partners in Washington for business ownership opportunities.
data.description: In Burbank, California on July 17, 2025, individuals interested in assisting others in reaching their career objectives can explore the opportunity of becoming an RBLP Authorized Training Partner (ATP). RBLP Training Partners are entrepreneurs who deliver preparation courses for leadership.

data.title: Leelanau Conservancy aims to revive Sugar Loaf for public access, with help from community to raise funds. Landowners pledge to donate the property.
data.description: Community support has successfully raised the required funds, leading to generous landowners committing to donating the esteemed Sugar Loaf property in Leelanau County, Michigan. This historic landscape, a prominent feature in Northern Michigan, is set for a significant revival. The notable donation of the Sugar Loaf property marks a pivotal moment in its history.

data.title: American Tungsten Corp increases private placement from $2.5M to $7.0M. Not for US dissemination.
data.description: This information is not intended for distribution in the United States or through U.S. newswire services.

data.title: FOX News Digital has its best quarter ever with total unique multiplatform visitors, hitting 1.2 billion views on YouTube, surpassing competitors. CNN's viewership drops to its lowest since 2015.
data.description: FOX News achieved its highest quarter viewership on YouTube, gaining 1.2 billion views, surpassing major news brands like ABC, CBS, and NBC News. In contrast, CNN experienced its lowest quarter in terms of multiplatform views and minutes since 2015. This news was reported on July 17, 2025, in New York, highlighting FOX News Digital's significant success on the platform.

data.title: Public interest in climate change is declining, with recent polls showing it is not a priority for most North Americans, according to Friends of Science Society.
data.description: According to recent polls, a majority of North Americans are no longer prioritizing climate change action, as reported by Friends of Science Society. This contradicts the 89% support for climate action advocacy by Covering Climate Now. The findings also go against claims made by Canada's Abacus Data about a surge in public interest in addressing climate change.

data.title: Possible 300% DOGE price surge if key level is regained, 18% increase this week suggests potential 300% rise by 2025.
data.description: This week, DOGE experienced an increase of 18%, bolstering hopes for a potential rally of 300% by the conclusion of 2025 as indicated by various data points.

data.title: AXT, Inc. announces passing of Board Member Christine Russell who joined in 2019; she passed on July 11, 2025.
data.description: In FREMONT, Calif., a prominent manufacturer of compound semiconductor substrates, AXT, Inc. (NasdaqGS: AXTI), announced the passing of Ms. Christine Russell, a valued member of the Company’s Board of Directors, on July 11, 2025. Ms. Russell had been serving on the Board since December 2019 as an independent director. She held the position of Chair of the Audit Committee and was an active member of the Compensation Committee and the Nominating and Corporate Governance Committee. AXT expressed its deep sorrow at the loss.

data.title: TAO Synergies buys $10M of Bittensor (TAO), holds 29,899 TAO tokens, aiming for yield generation.
data.description: As of now, 29,899 TAO tokens have been bought, which are then staked in a decentralized AI network to generate yield. In New York on July 17, 2025, TAO Synergies Inc. (Nasdaq: TAOX) revealed this information. They are a digital asset treasury company specializing in Bittensor (TAO), considered the leading crypto token.
